title: scrophularia umbrosa subsp. robusta
intro: Scrophularia umbrosa subsp. robusta, also known as robust woodland figwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of iridoid glycosides and phenolic acids. The robust woodland figwort is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, alleviate stress, and support overall well-being.
